extension.description: Browse and play audiobooks and podcasts from your AudioBookShelf server.
extension.news: v0.18.0 Video player is the default again — its OSD now tracks content time at non-1× tempo (via inputstream.tempo 0.3.10's dynamic ptsStart) and shows the richer "now playing" UI with cover-art and visualisation fanart. Music player remains available as an opt-in under Playback settings. Resume works the same in both modes.
